heading: Asset Management Report enhancements for transferred works
label: 505a–2 Asset Management Report enhancements for transferred works
notes: Definition of “Secretary”Secretary means the Secretary of the Interior, see , set out as a note under , Conservation.section 2 of Pub. L. 116–9section 1 of Title 16

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary shall coordinate with the non-Federal entities responsible for the operation and maintenance of transferred works in developing reporting requirements for Asset Management Reports with respect to major repair and rehabilitation needs for transferred works that are similar to the reporting requirements described in .section 505a–1(b) of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: After considering input from water and power contractors of the Bureau, the Secretary shall develop and implement a rating system for transferred works that incorporates, to the maximum extent practicable, the rating system for major repair and rehabilitation needs for reserved works developed under .section 505a–1(b)(3) of this title

children.heading: Updates
children.label: 2 Updates
children.text: The ratings system developed under paragraph (1) shall be included in the updated Asset Management Reports under .section 505a–1(c) of this title
